summary: Created Bootstrap 5 theme with compact spacing, enterprise colour palette, and zero border radius.
Changed primary font to Atkinson Hyperlegible from Google Fonts for accessibility.
Reduced base font to 14px, base spacer to 0.75rem, removed all border radius.
Rewrote 10 instruction files to align with Bootstrap theme scope; removed C#/.NET, Python, React, and database content.
Added semantic markers to all source files, AGENT headers to all markdown files, created knowledge base, updated build.sh with repo index rebuild, and fixed repo_index_lib.py extensions.
Changed body font from Rubik/Atkinson Hyperlegible to Open Sans and monospace font to JetBrains Mono. Added typography demo section to demo page. Font sizes unchanged (14px base).

Built ErrorDialog component: vanilla TypeScript modal for literate errors with suggestion box, technical accordion, clipboard copy, and retry. Added TypeScript and Bootstrap Icons to build pipeline. Updated demo page with 4 trigger buttons.

Built documentation system: auto-generation script produces DESIGN_TOKENS.md, COMPONENT_REFERENCE.md, and AGENT_QUICK_REF.md from source. Hand-written GETTING_STARTED, FONT_GUIDE, CUSTOM_CLASSES docs added. All docs converted to themed HTML in dist/docs/. Cleaned up outdated Atkinson font references. Added build:docs to pipeline.

Built EditableComboBox component: vanilla TypeScript combined text input and dropdown with substring filtering, keyboard navigation (WAI-ARIA combobox pattern), item grouping, size variants, disabled/readonly states, and programmatic API. Updated demo page with 7 demo scenarios. Generalised build:ts sed command for all components.

Added TimezonePicker (searchable IANA timezone dropdown with live time preview) and CronPicker (visual 6-field CRON expression builder with presets, description generator, and bidirectional raw editing).

Added MarkdownEditor — Vditor-based Bootstrap 5 Markdown editor with tab/side-by-side layout modes, collapsible panes, inline selection toolbar, GFM/Mermaid/Graphviz/PlantUML support, DOMPurify sanitisation, export to MD/HTML/PDF, and modal hosting.

Added StatusBar — fixed-bottom viewport status bar with configurable label/value regions, pipe dividers as text characters for Ctrl+C copying, O(1) Map-based region updates, dynamic add/remove, --statusbar-height CSS custom property, sm/md/lg size variants, and role=status accessibility.

Built Sidebar component: dockable, floatable, resizable panel with tab grouping, collapse-to-icon-strip, drag-to-dock with drop zones, CSS custom properties for layout offset, and SidebarManager singleton orchestrator.

Built BannerBar component: fixed-to-top viewport banner with info/warning/critical/success severity presets, optional title/icon/action, auto-dismiss timer, single-instance model, slide-in animation, --bannerbar-height CSS custom property, and sidebar top offset integration.

Built Toolbar component: programmable action bar with regions, split buttons, gallery controls, docked/floating modes, drag-to-dock, Priority+ overflow, KeyTips, layout persistence, resize, WAI-ARIA toolbar pattern. Z-index docked=1032, floating=1033, dropdowns=1034 (ADR-013).

Built Gauge component: visual measure modeled after ASN.1 Gauge type with tile (square), ring (circular SVG), and bar (linear) shapes. Value mode for numeric metrics, time mode for countdown with adaptive auto-tick. Configurable colour thresholds, over-limit/overdue states, fluid + explicit sizing, custom formatValue callback, ARIA meter/timer roles. Single class design (ADR-014), zero animations.

Built Conversation component: turn-by-turn AI chat UI with Vditor-rendered assistant messages, streaming token-by-token responses (two-phase: textContent during stream, Vditor.preview on complete), session management callbacks (new/load/clear/save), thumbs up/down feedback with written comments, clipboard copy in Markdown/HTML/plaintext, inline error display with expandable technical details, message buffer eviction, size variants (sm/md/lg), auto-scroll with user-override detection, WAI-ARIA log pattern. Custom-built after evaluating 9 open-source alternatives (ADR-015).

Built Timeline component: horizontal event timeline with point events (SVG diamond markers) and span events (positioned blocks), greedy row packing algorithm, grouping with collapsible collapse-to-presence-band (merged overlapping time ranges), selection/click callbacks, IntersectionObserver viewport visibility detection, adaptive tick interval axis, now marker with auto-update, size variants (sm/md/lg), container query responsiveness, native title tooltips, ARIA region pattern. Custom-built after evaluating 13 open-source alternatives (ADR-016).

Added three refinements to the Timeline component: (1) Configurable IANA timezone display via Intl.DateTimeFormat with optional built-in timezone selector badge/dropdown in the header; (2) Configurable tick intervals — explicit control via named presets (5min, 10min, 15min, 30min, 1h, etc.) or auto-select, added 10-minute preset, sub-hour ticks render as marks without text labels; (3) Drag-to-pan — PointerEvent-based horizontal drag on body/axis with requestAnimationFrame throttle, Shift+wheel support, 5px click disambiguation threshold, grab/grabbing cursor states. All backward-compatible with defaults of auto/false.

Enhanced Conversation component with MCP Apps specification support (mcpui.dev, stable 2026-01-26). Added McpAppFrame class (~200 lines) for sandboxed iframe rendering with CSP meta tag, JSON-RPC 2.0 postMessage bridge, Bootstrap theme injection via getComputedStyle, and event.source validation. Added inline MCP app rendering in message bubbles with expand-to-canvas button. Built optional canvas side panel with pointer-capture resize (min/max constraints), keyboard navigation (Esc close, Arrow resize), and ARIA complementary landmark. New API: addAppMessage(), openCanvas(), closeCanvas(), isCanvasOpen(). Extended StreamHandle.complete() to accept metadata for stream-to-app transition. Fixed getSession()/getMessages() deep copy of metadata. SCSS sections 18-22 for MCP frame, canvas panel, resize handle, container queries, and reduced motion. 4 demo scenarios: inline data table, canvas SVG chart, bidirectional form, error handling. Custom-built after evaluating @mcp-ui/client SDK (React-only, incompatible — ADR-017).

Built TabbedPanel component: dockable (top/bottom), floatable, collapsible tabbed panel with configurable tab bar position (top/left/bottom/right), dynamic tab add/remove, drag-to-dock with drop zones, pointer-capture resize handles, roving tabindex tab navigation, TabbedPanelManager singleton for CSS custom properties (--tabbedpanel-top-height, --tabbedpanel-bottom-height). Shares z-index tier with Sidebar (1035-1037, ADR-018). 6 demo scenarios: docked bottom terminal, docked top inspector, floating properties, collapse/expand, dynamic tabs, tab bar position variants.

Built TreeView component: highly configurable tree view for multi-tree structured data with lazy loading (Bootstrap spinner-border-sm inline, ProgressModal for bulk), multi-select (Ctrl+Click/Shift+Click/Ctrl+A), HTML5 DnD (internal + cross-tree + external via dataTransfer MIME), context menu (per-type items, z-index 1050), inline rename (F2), search with mark highlighting and ancestor expansion, starred/favourites virtual group, sort modes (alpha-asc/desc/newest/oldest/custom with folders-first), extensible node types via kind registry with TreeNodeTypeDescriptor, badges, toolbar actions, WAI-ARIA tree pattern keyboard navigation (arrows/Home/End/Space/Enter/F2/*/type-ahead), nested ul/li DOM, callbacks-only pattern (consumer owns CRUD, ADR-019). TreeGrid PRD spec written (230 lines, spec only). 8 demo scenarios: basic file tree, lazy-loaded, multi-select+starred, context menu+rename, internal DnD, cross-tree DnD, search+sort, explorer-style.

Optimized TreeView for 1M+ node trees: O(1) node index maps (nodeMap/parentMap replacing 20 recursive lookups), cached flat visible array with lazy invalidation (7 flattenVisible call sites), virtual scrolling with flat DOM and element recycling pool (auto-enables above 5000 visible nodes), incremental DOM updates for addNode/removeNode (O(1) instead of full rebuild), three-tier search routing (sync/chunked-rAF/server-async). Fixed infinite recursion bug in renderTree(). ADR-020.

Created TreeGrid component (~3900 lines): tree-table hybrid with hierarchical tree column + tabular data columns, inline editing (text/number/select/date), column resize/reorder/sort, 2D keyboard nav, virtual scrolling, summary rows, DnD, context menu, row striping. Standalone implementation (ADR-021) sharing patterns with TreeView.

Fixed critical bugs and added programmability: (1) deepCopyOptions replaced JSON.parse/stringify with shallow spread to preserve callbacks. (2) Column resize fixed — replaced CSS <style> nth-child selectors with direct inline styles (ADR-022), disabled draggable during resize to prevent browser drag hijack. (3) Column picker fixed — moved dropdown from headerEl (overflow:hidden) to rootEl, clear/reopen after rebuild. (4) Cell editor sizing — overlap cell by 1px, white background, select min-width 160px. (5) Sort no longer resets column widths — updateColumnStyles() called at end of renderTree(). (6) Type-aware defaultCompare() for numeric sort. (7) Per-column comparator callback. (8) externalSort option (ADR-023). (9) enableColumnReorder guard. (10) updateColumn() public API.

Added contained mode to 5 viewport-level components (Sidebar, Toolbar, StatusBar, TabbedPanel, BannerBar) and MarkdownEditor. Built DockLayout component: CSS Grid layout coordinator with 6 named areas inspired by Java Swing BorderLayout, auto-contained child mounting, dynamic grid template updates on resize/collapse, and onLayoutChange callback. ADR-024 (contained mode), ADR-025 (CSS Grid DockLayout).

Toolbar enhancements: title width option, left/right region alignment with flex spacer, rightContent HTML slot, three new item types (ToolInputItem, ToolDropdownItem, ToolLabelItem) with builder methods and SCSS (ADR-026). DockLayout mountComponent fix: hide() before show(cell) for already-visible factory-produced components using duck-typed isVisible/hide checks. StatusBar getElement() public method. Updated README docs and 5 new demo scenarios.

Built LogConsole component: reusable in-app logging console for high-level user actions and system events. 5 log levels (debug, info, warn, error, fatal) with per-level colour configuration and level filtering. Dark/light theme support with full colour and font customisation. requestAnimationFrame-batched DOM rendering for high-throughput logging. FIFO eviction with configurable max entries to bound memory. Clear and Export actions.

Fixed toolbar overflow algorithm: replaced tool-width-only measurement with full child-size summation, added dual per-group overflow buttons (left/right) positioned inline, portaled menus with position:fixed, fixed buildRoot() initialization ordering.

Fixed 6 toolbar demo bugs: (1-4) Portaled gallery popups and split menus to rootEl with position:fixed (same pattern as overflow menus) to escape overflow:hidden clipping. (5) Bumped popup z-index from 1034 to 1060 so toolbar popups appear above all layout components. (6) Fixed orientation toggle: added closeAllPopups(), rebuildRegionsDOM(), currentSize=0 reset to setOrientation(). Fixed resetOverflowState() to reset region display (not just tools), preserving explicitly hidden regions. Fixed vertical toolbar flex collapse by adding flex-basis:auto to .toolbar-vertical .toolbar-regions-container.

Two refinements: (1) Sidebar maxWidth default changed from fixed 600px to Math.round(window.innerWidth * 0.5) — viewport-relative cap prevents sidebar from consuming more than half the screen on any display. (2) TabbedPanel title resolution via resolveTitle() helper: returns explicit title if set, else active tab title, else 'Panel'. Replaced 5 inline fallback expressions in getTitle(), buildRoot() ARIA label, buildTitleBar(), and buildCollapsedStrip(). Backward-compatible — panels with explicit titles unchanged.

Implemented MaskedEntry component: masked input for sensitive non-password data (API keys, tokens, connection strings). Two masking strategies: native (type=password toggle) and custom (JS character replacement with configurable mask char). Show/hide toggle with bi-eye/bi-eye-slash icons, copy-to-clipboard with Clipboard API + fallback, Bootstrap input-group layout with sm/default/lg size variants, live ARIA region for screen reader announcements, read-only and disabled states. ~500 lines TypeScript.

Implemented Toast notification system: transient non-blocking notifications with singleton container at configurable viewport corners. Stacking with max visible + FIFO queue, auto-dismiss with CSS countdown progress bar, pause on hover, four severity variants (info/success/warning/error) with auto-icons, action buttons, Escape keyboard dismiss, entrance/exit slide animations. Z-index 1070. pvk-toast- CSS prefix avoids Bootstrap collision. ~550 lines TypeScript.

Implemented SkeletonLoader component: animated placeholder with CSS shimmer animation for loading states. Six presets (text, avatar, card, table, paragraph, custom). CSS-heavy with minimal JS — shimmer mixin, keyframe animation, reduced motion support. Deterministic pseudo-random width patterns for natural appearance. ~300 lines TypeScript.

Implemented EmptyState component: centered placeholder for empty views with icon/illustration, heading, description, CTA button, and secondary link. Three size variants (sm/md/lg) and compact mode for panel embedding. Dynamic updates via setHeading/setDescription/setIcon/showAction/hideAction. ~350 lines TypeScript.

Implemented ColorPicker component: canvas-based colour selection with saturation/brightness gradient, vertical hue strip, optional opacity slider, hex/RGB/HSL format tabs with text inputs, preset swatches grid, and popup/inline modes. All colour math (hex/RGB/HSL/HSV conversions) implemented internally without external libraries. Canvas rendering with rAF throttle, pointer-capture drag on palette/hue/opacity, keyboard accessibility, clipboard copy, ARIA slider/tablist/listbox patterns. ~900 lines TypeScript.

Implemented SplitLayout component: draggable resizable split pane container dividing space into N panes with flexbox + pointer-capture drag on dividers. Supports horizontal/vertical orientation, pane collapse/expand via double-click or API, nested layouts, three divider style variants (line, dots, handle), keyboard accessibility (arrow keys, Home/End, Enter), localStorage state persistence via persistKey, dynamic pane add/remove, and orientation switching. Initial sizes support pixels, percentages, and fractional units (1fr). ~800 lines TypeScript.

Created detailed PRD specs for 21 new components requested by apps team across 5 tiers: Tier 1 (MaskedEntry, ColorPicker, SplitLayout), Tier 2 (MultiselectCombo, CodeEditor, DataGrid, EmptyState, SkeletonLoader, Toast), Tier 3 (Tagger, FacetSearch, FileExplorer, CommentOverlay), Tier 4 (ReasoningAccordion, CommandPalette, PromptTemplateManager), Tier 5 (PermissionMatrix, AuditLogViewer, WorkspaceSwitcher, ActivityFeed), Extension (GraphToolbar). Recorded ADR-028 through ADR-032 for key architectural decisions: CodeMirror 6 for CodeEditor, DataGrid standalone, GraphToolbar as factory function, SplitLayout flexbox, Toast z-index 1070.

Implemented MultiselectCombo component: multi-select combo box with chips, checkboxes in dropdown, filtering, grouping, Select All with indeterminate state, max selections limit, chip or count badge display modes, +N more overflow badge, dropdown positioning, keyboard navigation, and ARIA live region announcements. ~900 lines TypeScript.

Implemented DataGrid component: high-performance flat data table with sorting (single/multi-column), column-level filtering (text, select, number-range, date-range), pagination with page controls, column resize (pointer-capture), column reorder (HTML5 drag-and-drop), row selection (single/multi/checkbox), inline cell editing (text/number/select/date), virtual scrolling (auto above 5K rows), footer aggregation (sum/avg/count/min/max/custom), CSV export, row striping, dense mode, pinned columns, and WAI-ARIA grid pattern with 2D keyboard navigation. ~2400 lines TypeScript.

Implemented CodeEditor component: Bootstrap 5-themed code editor wrapping CodeMirror 6 with toolbar (language selector, undo/redo, word wrap, copy, format, save), light/dark themes via CSS custom properties, textarea fallback when CodeMirror is not loaded, read-only mode, auto-grow, diagnostics gutter markers, Ctrl+S save, clipboard copy with visual feedback, and ARIA group/toolbar pattern. ~1100 lines TypeScript.

Implemented Tagger component: combined freeform and taxonomy tag input with colored chips, category badges, three color modes (category/hash/none), autocomplete dropdown with category groups and highlight matching, freeform creation row, per-category and global max tag limits, duplicate handling (reject with flash or ignore), comma-paste splitting, DJB2 hash coloring, custom validation, size variants (sm/default/lg), disabled/readonly states, ARIA combobox/listbox pattern with live region announcements. ~750 lines TypeScript.

Implemented FacetSearch component: facet-aware search bar with structured key:value query parsing, inline facet chips, context-sensitive autocomplete for facet keys and values, operators (:, !:, >, <, >=, <=), negation (-key:value), quoted values, standalone parseFacetQuery tokenizer, async value loading with debounced loadValues callbacks, recent search history, clear-all button, size variants (sm/default/lg), disabled state, ARIA combobox/listbox pattern with live region announcements. ~750 lines TypeScript.

Implemented FileExplorer component: two-pane file navigation with folder tree sidebar, breadcrumb navigation, three view modes (grid/list/detail), multi-selection (Ctrl+Click, Shift+Click, Ctrl+A), context menu with icon/label/shortcut/separator, inline rename with Enter/Escape/blur, sortable detail columns with three-state toggle (asc/desc/reset), folders-first sorting, pointer-capture divider drag for tree pane resize, virtual root for multi-root support, O(1) node lookups via nodeMap/parentMap, file extension to Bootstrap Icons mapping (35+ types), callback-driven operations (onOpen/onRename/onDelete/onMove/onCreateFolder/onUpload/onLoadChildren), keyboard navigation, ARIA region/toolbar/navigation/grid roles with live region announcements, status line with item/selection counts. ~1100 lines TypeScript.

Implemented CommentOverlay component: transparent annotation overlay with pins anchored to DOM elements via getBoundingClientRect + offset, SVG connector lines (dashed, 40% opacity), threaded comment popovers with avatar/author/timestamp/text, @mention autocomplete with @[userId] storage and styled chip rendering, debounced async onMentionSearch, inline edit with Ctrl+Enter save and Escape cancel, delete with confirmation, resolve/unresolve toggle with muted/hidden/normal display modes, pin placement mode with crosshair cursor and click-to-place, pointer-capture drag-to-reposition with 150ms long-press threshold, ResizeObserver + MutationObserver + scroll debounced repositioning, relative timestamp auto-update at 60s interval, pending pin cancellation on empty submit, JSON export, ARIA region/dialog/listbox/button roles with live region announcements. ~1500 lines TypeScript.

Implemented ReasoningAccordion component: collapsible accordion for AI chain-of-thought reasoning steps with four status states (pending/thinking/complete/error), shimmer animation on thinking headers, spinning status icon, per-step timing display with formatDuration helper, optional confidence progress bars (high/moderate/low colour-coded), three size variants (sm/default/lg), auto-expand active thinking steps, auto-collapse completed steps with 300ms delay, Vditor.preview markdown rendering with DOMPurify sanitisation fallback, expand-all/collapse-all toggle, summary header with step count and total duration, keyboard navigation (arrows/home/end/enter/space), ARIA region/list/listitem/button/progressbar roles with aria-live polite stats. ~650 lines TypeScript. Also added export keywords to CommentOverlay interfaces/class/factory for TypeScript module scope.

Implemented CommandPalette component: singleton Ctrl+K/Cmd+K omnibar with fuzzy search (prefix/substring/character-skip scoring across label/keywords/description), match highlighting via <mark> elements, category grouping with headers, recent commands persisted to localStorage (capped at maxRecent), configurable maxResults with Show All footer, backdrop overlay at z-index 1080, ARIA dialog/combobox/listbox/option roles, focus trapping (Tab intercepted), arrow key navigation with wrapping + Home/End, AbortController for clean listener teardown, platform-aware hotkey (Cmd on macOS), 100ms debounce for large command sets (>500), 100ms open/close cooldown. ~600 lines TypeScript.

Added PromptTemplateManager component — two-pane CRUD interface for prompt templates with {{variable}} extraction, preview, tags, categories, import/export, and inline split layout with draggable divider.

Added WorkspaceSwitcher component — multi-tenant workspace switcher with trigger button, searchable dropdown/modal, initials avatars with deterministic colours, size variants (sm/default/lg), member count, plan badges, keyboard navigation.

Added ActivityFeed component — social-style activity feed with date grouping, IntersectionObserver infinite scroll, 7 event types with default icons/colours, deterministic avatar colours, relative timestamps, real-time addEvent with entrance animation, rich content truncation, compact mode.

Added AuditLogViewer component — read-only filterable audit log with severity badges, expandable detail rows with before/after JSON, filter bar with chips, client/server pagination, CSV/JSON export, auto-refresh, roving tabindex keyboard navigation.

Added PermissionMatrix component — RBAC permission matrix with CSS Grid layout, tri-state checkboxes, inheritance resolution with circular detection, bulk group operations, debounced text filter with mark highlighting, change tracking with net-zero detection, sticky headers, JSON export, arrow key cell navigation.

Updated COMPONENTS.md with WorkspaceSwitcher, ActivityFeed, AuditLogViewer, and PermissionMatrix entries. Updated agentknowledge/concepts.yaml with component and styles definitions for all 4 Tier 5 components. Updated agentknowledge/history.jsonl.

Added GraphToolbar extension — factory function wrapping Toolbar component (ADR-030) with preconfigured regions for graph editing (undo/redo/delete), layout algorithm selection, zoom controls, grid snap/minimap toggles, export dropdown, and search input. Returns GraphToolbarHandle facade with convenience methods. Document-level keyboard shortcuts with focus/modal guards. ~350 lines TypeScript.

Created detailed PRD specs for 21 new components requested by apps team across 5 tiers: Tier 1 (MaskedEntry, ColorPicker, SplitLayout), Tier 2 (MultiselectCombo, CodeEditor, DataGrid, EmptyState, SkeletonLoader, Toast), Tier 3 (Tagger, FacetSearch, FileExplorer, CommentOverlay), Tier 4 (ReasoningAccordion, CommandPalette, PromptTemplateManager), Tier 5 (PermissionMatrix, AuditLogViewer, WorkspaceSwitcher, ActivityFeed), Extension (GraphToolbar). Recorded ADR-028 through ADR-032 for key architectural decisions: CodeMirror 6 for CodeEditor, DataGrid standalone, GraphToolbar as factory function, SplitLayout flexbox, Toast z-index 1070.
Created KEYBOARD.md to define consistent keyboard combinations across the enterprise SaaS platform and updated concepts.yaml with KeyboardShortcutRegistry.
Added checkbox, toggle switch, number spinner, and color picker input types to Toolbar component. Each type supports overflow, state management, and tooltip. Fixed #fff to $gray-50 in existing SCSS.

Fixed TabbedPanel and Sidebar not respecting collapsed:true at init. Constructor now sets this.collapsed=true before applyCollapsedState(). TabbedPanel also updates collapsed strip title after addInitialTabs() so active tab title shows instead of default.

Implemented 8 layout container components from MASTER_COMPONENT_LIST section 21. Batch 1 (Flexbox): BoxLayout (single-axis flex), FlowLayout (wrapping flex). Batch 2 (CSS Grid): GridLayout (uniform grid), BorderLayout (5-region N/S/E/W/Center), FlexGridLayout (mixed tracks + spanning). Batch 3 (Position): CardLayout (indexed stack with transitions), LayerLayout (z-stack all visible), AnchorLayout (edge-constraint positioning). All implement composability contract (show/hide/destroy/getState/setState/setContained). DockLayout and SplitLayout already existed.

Audit all 50 components for KEYBOARD.md compliance. Fixed 4 critical gaps (Conversation submit key, TabbedPanel Ctrl+1-9/Ctrl+Tab, Timeline zoom/scroll shortcuts, CardLayout arrow navigation). Added overridable keyBindings option with DEFAULT_KEY_BINDINGS + resolveKeyCombo/matchesKeyCombo helpers to all 31 interactive components. Updated KEYBOARD.md with Overriding Key Bindings section.

Built 5 new components: StatusBadge (colour-coded status indicators with pulse), ConfirmDialog (promise-based confirmation modal), SearchBox (debounced search with suggestions), UserMenu (avatar dropdown with keyboard nav), FileUpload (drag-drop upload with progress). Added demo sections, MASTER_COMPONENT_LIST entries, and agentknowledge updates.

Built AppLauncher component: grid-based application launcher with three view modes (dropdown/modal/fullpage). Dropdown uses portal on document.body with collision detection positioning. Modal has backdrop + scale animation + category tabs. Fullpage renders inline with sidebar navigation. Features: 150ms debounced search with async fallback, localStorage-persisted favourites and recent apps (MRU max 6), badge variants (info/success/warning/danger), active app indicator, 2D grid keyboard navigation with roving tabindex, configurable key bindings. ~950 lines TypeScript, ~530 lines SCSS.

Fixed DataGrid pagination footer rendering unstyled and stacked vertically. Root cause: flex layout was on .datagrid-pagination div but children were inside a <nav> child with no flex styles. Moved flexbox to the nav element. Grouped page-size select and export button into .datagrid-pagination-actions wrapper for three-zone horizontal layout (info left, pages center, actions right).

Built FormDialog component — modal dialog for form workflows with single-page and wizard modes, 12 field types, collapsible sections, resizable panel, validation, focus trapping, loading state, dirty tracking, step transitions. ~1500 lines TS, ~700 lines SCSS.
Built Ribbon component — Microsoft Office-style tabbed toolbar with adaptive groups, QAT, menu bar, backstage, KeyTips, 13 control types, and configurable colours.

task: Built FontDropdown component — dropdown picker rendering each font name in its own typeface. 17 web-safe defaults, search filtering, recently-used localStorage, keyboard nav, sm/default/lg sizes.
Built SymbolPicker component — grid-based picker for Unicode characters (~500) and Bootstrap Icons (~200). Category tabs, search, preview panel, inline/popup modes, recently-used localStorage.

summary: FontDropdown dropdown now uses position:fixed instead of position:absolute to escape overflow:hidden containers (e.g. Ribbon panels). Enables reliable rendering when embedded as a custom control inside Ribbon groups.

Added mode:'display' to MarkdownEditor for chrome-free read-only markdown rendering. No header, toolbar, tabs, resize handle, or border — just rendered content. CSS resize:both for corner resizing. Full Mermaid/PlantUML/code-highlight support via Vditor.preview().

Ribbon demo now uses FontDropdown as a custom control in the Font group, demonstrating Ribbon's custom control type hosting third-party pickers. FontDropdown's fixed positioning enables correct rendering inside Ribbon's overflow:hidden panels.

Built Smart Text Input Engine — behavioral middleware with trigger registry, state machine detector, PlainTextAdapter, ContentEditableAdapter, popover event coordination, token model/serializer/renderer, on() multi-subscriber events, static renderTokens(), ARIA live region. ~2200 TS lines, ~250 SCSS lines. Added demo with textarea, contenteditable, and static rendering examples.

Added 4 backward-compatible enhancements: onInput real-time callback (fires during drag, onChange on commit), label option with setLabel(), getPopupElement() for z-index control, enhanced disabled visual state with cursor:not-allowed, aria-disabled, and suppressed hover effects.

Added 4 backward-compatible display-mode enhancements: isolated option (CSS reset boundary to prevent style bleed), compact option (tighter spacing for sidebars), theme dark option (dark color scheme for tooltips/popovers), and guaranteed onReady callback in display mode after render.

Built Pill component — reusable inline pill element for mentions, issues, tags. 6 colour presets (blue/gray/green/red/purple/orange), 3 sizes (sm/md/lg), dismissible, clickable, hover callbacks, anchor mode, CSS custom properties for runtime override, entrance animation, reduced motion support. Fixed STIE .stie-token-pill border-radius from $border-radius (0) to 9999px (ADR-034). ~300 lines TypeScript, ~180 lines SCSS.

Added naked mode to MarkdownEditor — chrome-free editable Vditor surface with no header, toolbar, or tabs. Feels like a resizable textarea that understands markdown. CSS resize:both, form-control border, empty toolbar array. Supports all callbacks (onChange, onSave, onReady), size variants, placeholder, disabled state, and setMode() transitions to/from other modes.

Built RichTextInput component — lightweight contenteditable rich text input composing STIE and Pill for per-row editing. Inline formatting (bold/italic/strike/code/link via execCommand + keyboard shortcuts), ordered/unordered/task lists, paste sanitization (DOMParser + tag allowlist), floating inline toolbar on selection, shared singleton selectionchange listener, HTML-primary serialization with optional markdown DOM walker, optional STIE composition (graceful skip if not loaded), character counter, size variants (sm/default/lg), disabled/readonly states, CSS custom properties, reduced motion support. ADR-035.

Built PersonChip component — compact inline person-identity chip with avatar (image/initials), name, status dot, email/role detail. Matches UserMenu trigger visual style. Three sizes (sm/md/lg), clickable mode with keyboard support, metadata for PeoplePicker integration. 7 demo sections.

Built PeoplePicker component — searchable person selector with frequent contacts, async search (callback + URL), PersonChip integration for rows (md) and chips (sm), single-select and multi-select modes, overflow badge, keyboard navigation (ArrowUp/Down/Enter/Escape/Backspace/Home/End), generation counter for stale result prevention, disabled/readonly states, size variants (sm/md/lg). 8 demo sections. ADR-037.

Built PresenceIndicator component — overlapping avatar stack for collaborative presence. Enhanced PersonChip with avatarOnly mode. Collapsed stack with z-index stacking, negative-margin overlap, white ring borders, overflow badge. Expanded list with full PersonChip instances. Three size variants (sm/md/lg). Keyboard toggle (Enter/Space/Escape). Runtime PersonChip bridge with inlined fallback. ~480 lines TS, ~190 lines SCSS.

Created ShareDialog — modal share dialog composing PeoplePicker and PersonChip with configurable access levels, diff computation (added/changed/removed), promise-based and imperative APIs, FormDialog overlay pattern (z-index 2000), native select for access levels, three size variants, focus trap, screen reader announcements, loading state, graceful degradation fallbacks. ADR-039.

Migrated 8 dropdown components from position:absolute to position:fixed to prevent clipping inside overflow:hidden containers (modals, scrollable panels). Pattern from FontDropdown: getBoundingClientRect() viewport coords, flip-above logic, horizontal clamp. Components: EditableComboBox, DatePicker, TimePicker, DurationPicker, TimezonePicker, MultiSelectCombo, Tagger, PeoplePicker. Removed -above CSS class variants. ADR-040.
